        """PRIMARY: Verify cluster actually exists on GCP via sky status."""
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["sky", "status", CLUSTER_NAME],
            capture_output=True, text=True

tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_cluster_status_is_active
tests.trace:
def test_cluster_status_is_active():
        """PRIMARY: Verify cluster is active on GCP."""
        result = subprocess.run(["sky", "status", CLUSTER_NAME], capture_output=True, text=True)
        assert result.returncode == 0, f"sky status failed: {result.stderr}"
        is_active = any(s in result.stdout for s in ["UP", "INIT", "LAUNCHING", "PROVISIONING"])
